Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players have access to the latest features and fixes.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Dynamically updates timestamps in strings to reflect real-time changes.
Changed_Other.purpose: Keeps players informed with up-to-date information on events or changes.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Uses a faster method to retrieve version identifiers from the code repository.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves the performance of the platform by speeding up version checks.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the way timestamps are processed and displayed in strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Makes the display of time-related information faster and more efficient for players.

Added_Other.name: FFlagAppChatHideMoreButtonFAE
Added_Other.mechanism: Removes the 'More' button from the chat interface.
Added_Other.purpose: Simplifies the chat experience for players, making it easier to use.

Added_Other.name: FFlagEnableRefactorAdServiceLogic
Added_Other.mechanism: Reworks the backend logic for how ads are served in games.
Added_Other.purpose: Increases ad relevance and performance, benefiting both developers and players.

Added_Security.name: FFlagAXSafeMinMaxPrice
Added_Security.mechanism: Implements safe limits for minimum and maximum prices of items.
Added_Security.purpose: Protects players from accidentally setting prices too low or too high.
